description: Letter fragment from a father to his son Mūsā. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: probably late 12th or early 13th century. Torn vertically down the middle. The sender vigorously rebukes his son for his poor decisions and lack of "manliness" (muruwwa). Mentions al-Thiqa and the sulṭān. Bears some resemblances to the letters of Manṣūr b. Sālim.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
